archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Adapted for Analytics/Habit Tracking)

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: MODE B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID for density and data correlation
spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Flat solid surfaces with 1px border-white/10 for cards. Crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) for sticky bottom navigation.

component_patterns.cards: Flat background (#121212), 1px subtle border (border-white/10), rounded-2xl, no shadow by default. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
component_patterns.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-[#007AFF] text-white rounded-full hover:bg-blue-500. Focus: ring-2 ring-blue-400.
component_patterns.charts: Use Recharts. Use layered gradients for area charts (e.g., #007AFF to transparent) and segmented progress rings.
component_patterns.icons: lucide-react, 24px default size, stroke-width 1.5. No emojis.
component_patterns.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

screen_layouts.name: Dashboard (Home)
screen_layouts.layout: Sticky Header with Avatar and Date -> Large Hero Progress Ring (Total Time) -> 'Task vs Fun' Stacked Bar -> Top 3 Categories List.

screen_layouts.name: Categories Breakdown
screen_layouts.description: Detailed view of time spent per category.
screen_layouts.layout: Grid of cards for each category (Productivity, Comm, Ent, AI) with sparkline charts showing weekly trend.

screen_layouts.name: App Usage List
screen_layouts.layout: Search/Filter Bar -> Vertical list of apps with icons, category badges, and time spent (right aligned).

screen_layouts.name: AI Insights
screen_layouts.layout: Hero card with AI glowing accent (Tracing Beam effect) -> List of text-based insights and goals to reduce screen time.

screen_layouts.name: Permission Flow (Onboarding)
screen_layouts.description: Elegant request for Usage Access permission.
screen_layouts.layout: Full screen immersive layout. Large central illustration/icon -> Value proposition text -> Large primary CTA button.

image_urls.description: Abstract dark background with slight orange/blue glow, use for onboarding screen background.
Professional user avatar for the profile section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT use default Tailwind blue/purple.
Implement bottom tab navigation using fixed positioning and crystal glassmorphism.
Ensure charts (Recharts) match the dark theme, using the primary and secondary accent colors. Make axes/grid lines subtle (white/10).
Include data-testid on every interactive element (e.g., data-testid='nav-dashboard-button').
Use Manrope for all headings and DM Sans for body text.
Do NOT use generic card shadows; use 1px solid borders on cards to match 'Tactical' look.
